name: Komori Corporation
summary: Komori Corporation designs, manufactures, imports, sells, repairs, and fabricates printing presses, and related equipment and components in Japan, the Americas, Europe, China, and internationally. Its products include sheet-fed offset presses, including the LITHRONE and ENTHRONE series; web offset presses comprising the SYSTEM series; and digital printing systems that include Impremia series, and related equipment and devices, as well as CMS based on offset printing systems. The company's products also comprise H-UV curing systems, banknote and security printing machinery, Chambon packaging printing presses, integrated print quality control systems, PEPIO series gravure offset printing machines, printed electronics systems, and platemaking equipment. In addition, it offers Apressia offset post presses, such as cutter and cutting systems, die cutters, blanking systems, and digital cutting and creasing systems; and KP-Connect, an IoT-driven, cloud based system to check the status of printing operations. Further, it is involved in the technical and printing training; and printing technology research activities. Additionally, the company provides real estate leasing and management services; and customer finance for printing presses and related equipment. Komori Corporation was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
